title: Curtis Smith
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Curtis Smith''' created an RPG scenario, which [[Pablo Hidalgo]] based his comic series [[Rookies (webstrips)|''Rookies'']] on. The original scenario was published in [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'']].

==''Star Wars'' Bibliography==
===Roleplaying Material===
*''[[Rebel Breakout]]'' (Editor)
*[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'']]
*''[[Star Wars Sourcebook (Second Edition)]]''
*''[[The Star Wars Sourcebook]]''

===Short Stories===
*''[[Song for a Fallen Nomad]]''

==Sources==
*''[[The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]''
